headline: GDV’s 6.1% Yield Faces a Hidden Test in 2026 Small-Cap Downturn
summary: Gabelli Dividend & Income Trust (NYSE:GDV) trades near $29 and pays a $0.15 monthly distribution, up from $0.11 per month in 2024 to $0.14 in 2025 to $0.15 starting January 2026. headline: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Still Sensibly Priced After Its Recent Share Price Steadiness?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Coca-Cola at around US$75 a share still offers fair value or is starting to look stretched, the key is to focus on what the current price implies rather than the brand story. The stock has recently shown mixed moves, with a 1.2% decline over the last 7 days, a 1.0% return over 30 days, and returns of 9.2% year to date and 6.7% over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on Coca-Cola as a mature consumer staple name, with investors weighing its defensive...

headline: Carlsberg Replaces Coke With Pepsi In Northern Europe, Royal Unibrew Shares Drop 20%
summary: Carlsberg will become PepsiCo's bottler in Denmark, Finland, and the Baltics from 2029, ending Coca-Cola agreements and expanding its footprint to 14 markets.

raw.headline: Carlsberg Replaces Coke With Pepsi In Northern Europe, Royal Unibrew Shares Drop 20%

headline: Women-Owned tbg Events Celebrates 25 Years & Two Decades Producing The Milken Institute Global Conference
summary: For more than 20 years, one of the world's most influential global conferences has been shaped behind the scenes by a women-owned event production firm. In 2025, tbg Events celebrated its 25th anniversary, marking a legacy defined by discretion, scale, and sustained excellence — including its long-standing role as a production partner for programs affiliated with The Milken Institute.

headline: Forget the Dividend Narrative. Coca-Cola Has Quietly Pivoted Its Growth Strategy.
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) trades at $75.48, up about 8% year-to-date in a choppy market. Most investors explain that with two words: safe dividend. That doesn’t tell the whole story. Two Moves, One Week, One Message Earlier this year, Coca-Cola was actively shopping Costa Coffee, the hot-beverages chain it acquired in 2019. The sale process collapsed ...
